rationale: The response cuts off mid-sentence after 'Recent sales of,' leaving the piece fundamentally incomplete. What exists is genuinely well-written: the opening formula is clear and concrete, the kitchen-renovation line adds personality, headers provide logical scaffolding, and the language is consistently plain. However, the piece never covers the tax-rate side of the equation, never explains why bills change year to year (the core of the prompt), and delivers only a fraction of the needed information. Incompleteness is the dominant flaw.
